name: address-normalization
rationale: Broker email uses abbreviated address forms ('1142 Tory Rd NW' instead of '1142 Tory Road NW'). loan_application + appraisal show fully-spelled-out form. F1.AD canonical-map address normalization (per canonical-fields.js ADDRESS_ABBREV_EXPAND) must canonicalize 'Rd' → 'Road' so both sources resolve to same canonical value. Tests address-string normalization producing consistent canonical despite source-string variation.
notes: Single-event sequence. Normalization test specifically — broker uses Rd/Blvd/St abbreviations; docs use full forms.
